$comment: EXAMPLE ONLY — NOT ACTIVE, NOT READ BY ANY TOOL. This file does not grant any permission on its own; Claude Code does not read .claude/permissions/*.json. Real, unattended-tool permissions live in .claude/settings.json under permissions.allow, as `mcp__<server>__<tool>` rules. The block below is the CORRECT-FORMAT fragment that WOULD let the Producer background worker call the Magnific Space-mutating MCP tools without a per-call prompt — IF it were merged into .claude/settings.json. It is left here, inert, as a copy-ready template for the deferred live-Magnific adapter. Do NOT edit the user's live settings.json to enable this; that is a future, deliberate step. Known limitation: an `mcp__magnific__*` allow rule grants the tool regardless of its arguments — it cannot be scoped to a single Space id, so the single-Space guarantee still has to come from the worker/adapter, not from this rule. See docs/producer-worker-permissions.md.
